scope: Medidores v1: Probe, Voltimeter, Ampmeter, FreqMeter, Oscope, Logic Analyzer
rootCause: Os instrumentos divergiam porque parte ainda vinha de fallbacks por typeId: Probe era SVG manual, medidores digitais tinham LCD manual, e Oscope/Logic Analyzer eram painéis reinterpretados. Agora Probe/digitais usam package.simulidePaint/package.pins e PlotBase usa package.qtWidget, todos no mesmo fluxo de renderer/offset/scale/pinos.
rendererChanges: SimulidePaintPrimitive text agora aceita stateText para Meter::updateStep e FreqMeter::updateStep.
PackageShape text renderiza multiplas linhas com tspan, preservando QGraphicsSimpleTextItem.
PackagePin aceita leadColor para cores declaradas de Pin::setColor, sem desenho hardcoded.
stateFill agora aceita regras numericas com valueProp para thresholds configuraveis do Probe.
PackageDescriptor agora aceita qtWidget.kind=plotBase para traduzir DataWidget/DataLaWidget/PlotDisplay do SimulIDE.

items.label: Sonda

source.notes: Non-small Probe uses m_area QRect(-12,-8,20,16), input IoPin(180,QPoint(-22,0)) with length 14 when rotation is not multiple of 90, and paint draws ellipse QRect(-8,-8,16,16). Constructor setRotation(-45) is not represented yet because LasecSimul component rotation is restricted to 0/90/180/270.

items.svg: <g transform="translate(0.000,0.000)"><g transform="scale(1.000000,1.000000)"><ellipse cx="22" cy="8" rx="8" ry="8" stroke="#000" fill="#e6e6ff" stroke-width="1.5"/></g></g><line x1="0.0" y1="8.0" x2="13.3" y2="8.0" stroke="#000" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>

items.label: Voltimetro

source.notes: Same Meter base geometry as Ampmeter. The subclass only changes m_unit to V and initial display text to ' 0.000\n V'.

items.svg: <g transform="translate(0.000,0.000)"><g transform="scale(1.000000,1.000000)"><rect x="0" y="0" width="48" height="32" rx="1" ry="1" stroke="#000000" fill="#000000" stroke-width="1"/><text x="2" y="2" text-anchor="start" font-size="13" dominant-baseline="text-before-edge" font-family="Ubuntu Mono" font-weight="700" fill="#ffff00"><tspan x="2" dy="0">-2.499</tspan><tspan x="2" dy="14.95"> V</tspan></text></g></g><line x1="16.0" y1="40.0" x2="16.0" y2="32.7" stroke="#ff0000" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/><line x1="32.0" y1="40.0" x2="32.0" y2="32.7" stroke="#000" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/><line x1="56.0" y1="16.0" x2="48.7" y2="16.0" stroke="#000" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>

items.label: Amperimetro

source.notes: Meter::paint draws a black rounded rect at QRectF(-24,-24,48,32). QGraphicsSimpleTextItem is Ubuntu Mono bold pixelSize 13, yellow, pos(-22,-22). Pins are Pin(270,QPoint(-8,16)), Pin(270,QPoint(8,16)) and IoPin(0,QPoint(32,-8)); these QPoint values are the electrical terminal positions, so package pins use leadOrigin=terminal and Pin::paint trim 0.7.

items.svg: <g transform="translate(0.000,0.000)"><g transform="scale(1.000000,1.000000)"><rect x="0" y="0" width="48" height="32" rx="1" ry="1" stroke="#000000" fill="#000000" stroke-width="1"/><text x="2" y="2" text-anchor="start" font-size="13" dominant-baseline="text-before-edge" font-family="Ubuntu Mono" font-weight="700" fill="#ffff00"><tspan x="2" dy="0"> 1.200</tspan><tspan x="2" dy="14.95"> mA</tspan></text></g></g><line x1="16.0" y1="40.0" x2="16.0" y2="32.7" stroke="#ff0000" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/><line x1="32.0" y1="40.0" x2="32.0" y2="32.7" stroke="#000" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/><line x1="56.0" y1="16.0" x2="48.7" y2="16.0" stroke="#000" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>

items.label: Frequencimetro

source.notes: m_area is QRectF(-32,-10,85,20) and paint draws the same rounded rect filled black. Display is Ubuntu Mono bold pixelSize 13, yellow, pos(-30,-6). Input pin is Pin(180,QPoint(-40,0)); QPoint is electrical terminal and visual lead reaches the rect after Pin::paint trim 0.7.

items.svg: <g transform="translate(0.000,0.000)"><g transform="scale(1.000000,1.000000)"><rect x="8" y="0" width="85" height="20" rx="1" ry="1" stroke="#000000" fill="#000000" stroke-width="1"/><text x="10" y="4" text-anchor="start" font-size="13" dominant-baseline="text-before-edge" font-family="Ubuntu Mono" font-weight="700" fill="#ffff00">2.5000 kHz</text></g></g><line x1="0.0" y1="10.0" x2="7.3" y2="10.0" stroke="#000" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>

items.label: Osciloscopio

source.notes: Collapsed PlotBase: m_baSize=135, screen=143x143, widgetSize=215x147, proxy pos(-78,-71), m_area(-80,-73,219,153). Package bounds include left IoPin terminals at x=-88.

source.notes: Same collapsed PlotBase dimensions as Oscope, with 8 QLineEdit channel boxes and 8 input IoPins at QPoint(-88,-64+16*i).
